        themeData
      • themeData(brightness = bLight; fontFamily = "system"; defaultRadius = 12.0'f32): ThemeData

Material 3 theme. Holds the color scheme, typography and shape tokens that Material widgets (AppBar, ElevatedButton, Card, etc.) read via the ambient theme accessor currentTheme().

To set the theme: either let MaterialApp install it (the standard path), or call setTheme(themeData(...)) directly before constructing a tree that uses Material widgets.

Imports

../foundation/color, ../foundation/geometry, ../rendering/text

Types

Brightness = enum
  bLight, bDark
Whether the theme is intended for light or dark surfaces. bLight swaps to the dark scheme via themeData(bDark). 
ColorScheme = object
  primary*: Color            ## brand accent (buttons, FABs).
  onPrimary*: Color          ## text/icons drawn on `primary`.
  primaryContainer*: Color   ## tinted surface for primary content.
  secondary*: Color          ## supporting accent.
  onSecondary*: Color        ## text/icons drawn on `secondary`.
  background*: Color         ## page background.
  onBackground*: Color       ## text on `background`.
  surface*: Color            ## elevated surface (cards, sheets).
  onSurface*: Color          ## text on `surface`.
  error*: Color              ## error indication color.
  onError*: Color            ## text/icons on `error`.
  outline*: Color            ## subtle borders / dividers.
Material 3 color roles. Pair each "X" color with the "onX" color used for content drawn ON TOP of it. 
ThemeData = object
  brightness*: Brightness
  colorScheme*: ColorScheme
  typography*: Typography
  defaultRadius*: float32    ## rounding for cards and surfaces.
  fontFamily*: string
Complete bundle of theme tokens. Material widgets read this (via currentTheme()) to pick colors and type styles. 
Typography = object
  displayLarge*: TextStyle
  headlineLarge*: TextStyle
  titleLarge*: TextStyle
  bodyLarge*: TextStyle
  bodyMedium*: TextStyle
  bodySmall*: TextStyle
  labelLarge*: TextStyle
A small set of named text styles roughly matching Material 3's scale. Widgets pick whichever matches their role (a title bar uses titleLarge, body text uses bodyMedium, etc.).

Vars

currentThemeVar: ThemeData = themeData(bLight, "system", 12.0'f32)
The current theme. Read it via currentTheme(). Replace via setTheme(t) or by mounting a MaterialApp with a different theme field.

Consts

defaultDarkScheme = (primary: (value: 4291869951'u),
                     onPrimary: (value: 4281867890'u),
                     primaryContainer: (value: 4283381643'u),
                     secondary: (value: 4291609308'u),
                     onSecondary: (value: 4281478977'u),
                     background: (value: 4280032031'u),
                     onBackground: (value: 4293321189'u),
                     surface: (value: 4280032031'u),
                     onSurface: (value: 4293321189'u),
                     error: (value: 4294097077'u),
                     onError: (value: 4284486672'u),
                     outline: (value: 4287860633'u))
defaultLightScheme = (primary: (value: 4284612846'u),
                      onPrimary: (value: 4294967295'u),
                      primaryContainer: (value: 4293582335'u),
                      secondary: (value: 4284636017'u),
                      onSecondary: (value: 4294967295'u),
                      background: (value: 4294966270'u),
                      onBackground: (value: 4280032031'u),
                      surface: (value: 4294967295'u),
                      onSurface: (value: 4280032031'u),
                      error: (value: 4289930782'u),
                      onError: (value: 4294967295'u),
                      outline: (value: 4286149758'u))

Procs

proc currentTheme(): ThemeData {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the active theme. Material widgets call this during their build to pick colors and styles. 
proc defaultTypography(fontFamily = "system"): Typography {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Builds the default Material type scale using fontFamily for all styles. Override individual TextStyle entries on the returned value to customize. 
proc popTheme() {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Deprecated no-op. The push/pop stack is gone; nothing to pop. 
proc pushTheme(t: ThemeData) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Deprecated alias for setTheme. Kept for code that predates the switch from a stack-based theme model. 
proc setTheme(t: ThemeData) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Replaces the active theme. Has no automatic rebuild effect; the caller is responsible for triggering a rebuild (typically via setState on the root stateful widget). 
proc themeData(brightness = bLight; fontFamily = "system";
               defaultRadius = 12.0'f32): ThemeData {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}

Builds a ThemeData from a small set of high-level parameters.

Inputs:

  • brightness: bLight (default) or bDark. Selects the color scheme.
  • fontFamily: default font family for every typography role.
  • defaultRadius: rounding applied to cards and surfaces.

Output: a populated ThemeData. Install via setTheme(...) or by passing to materialApp(theme = ...).
